description: PR-mined: real upstream commit 51ffdbe27050d624f9b75032d429a60176255fd8 ('Added translation using Weblate (French)', privacy-friendly-ruler). Adds a brand-new values-fr/strings.xml -- but the real commit's file is an empty placeholder (<resources></resources>, no <string> entries yet), so it introduces zero new R.string names despite being a whole new resource file. editClass deliberately omits 'add' (the README's R-regen trigger substring): no new resource NAMES exist to regenerate R for, only a new (empty) qualifier directory.
